title: Kulka-BetterCooldowns
description: A lightweight and customizable HUD mod to track item cooldowns with ease.
body:
Kulka's Better Cooldowns

Better Cooldowns is a lightweight Fabric mod designed to enhance your gameplay by providing a clear and customizable HUD for item cooldowns. No more guessing when your Ender Pearl or Shield is ready!
Features:

    Customizable HUD: Move the cooldown display anywhere on your screen using X and Y coordinates.

    Scaling: Adjust the size of the HUD to fit your interface perfectly.

    Seconds Display (BETA): Toggle between percentage-based progress and a countdown in seconds.

    Mod Menu Integration: Easy-to-use configuration screen (requires YetAnotherConfigLib).

Configuration:

To open the configuration menu, you need to have Mod Menu installed. Click on the "Configure" button in the mod list to adjust:

    Enable/Disable Mod: Quickly toggle the entire mod on or off.

    HUD Position: Fine-tune the horizontal and vertical position.

    HUD Scale: Scale the display from 0.5x up to 3.0x.

    Show Seconds: Choose your preferred way of tracking cooldowns.

Requirements:

To run this mod, you need:

    Fabric API

    YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) v3
